items.name: Chicken Chhoila (Served Cold)
items.description: Charcoal grilled marinated chicken meat tossed on fresh ginger and garlic, marinated in mustard oil, and homemade roasted Himalayan herbs and spices.

items.name: Chicken Chhoila Khaja Set
items.description: Comes with Nepali style achar, beaten rice, salads, bhatmas and peanut sadheko, chicken chhoila.

items.name: Chilli Chips
items.description: Fried chips tossed with veggies and authentic tomato sauce.

items.name: Fried Rice
items.description: Rice fried with flavour of Nepalese herbs and spices.

items.name: Chowmein
items.description: Nepalese style stir fried noodles sauteed with veggies, chickpeas, garlic, ginger, soy sauce, and Nepalese herbs and spices.

items.name: Steamed Momo
items.description: Comes with Nepalese style homemade sauce.

items.name: Fried Momo
items.description: Comes with Nepalese style homemade sauce.

items.name: Jhol Soup Momo
items.description: Steamed momo served with the authentic soup made of roasted peanut, sesame seeds, brown soybean and roasted tomatoes.

items.name: Chilly Momo
items.description: Fried momo tossed with authentic sauce, Nepalese chilli sauce and veggies.
